text:
“Insurance” means:

(1) A motor vehicle liability policy; or

(2) The security provided by a self-insurer pursuant to NRS 485.380 .
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 485
##### § 485.037 — “Insurance” defined.

“Insurance” means:

(1) A motor vehicle liability policy; or

(2) The security provided by a self-insurer pursuant to NRS 485.380 .

subsections.text: A motor vehicle liability policy; or
The security provided by a self-insurer pursuant to NRS 485.380 .
